body.title: Programming engrams layer 4 — sketch + seed templates to live DB
body.result: 5 layer 4 TEMPLATE nodes seeded (READ_CODEBASE, WRITE_TEST, RUN_BASH, PATCH_FILE, VERIFY_RESULT). All 8 layer 3 nodes also seeded to live DB. pe_run_bash() added to pe_chain.py. 133 new tests, 1602 total passing.
body.description: Layer 3 stdlib (8 TEMPLATE nodes: PARSE_GOAL, SITUATE, DECOMPOSE, CONSTRAIN, OBSERVE, HYPOTHESIZE, REPLAN, SCOPE_CHECK) is done. Layer 4: design the concrete programming-task templates that compose layer 3 bricks — e.g. READ_CODEBASE, WRITE_TEST, RUN_BASH, PATCH_FILE, VERIFY_RESULT. Sketch the layer 4 basket contracts, seed TEMPLATE nodes to live DB, write tests.
